system.description:
Support modules provide a variety of miscellaneous benefits; these benefits often apply to the vehicle's passengers in addition to the Pilot themselves.

  • A personal vehicle cannot have more than one enabled support modules of the same name.

  • Some support modules are particularly complex or cumbersome and count as two modules towards the limit on total active modules.

SUPPORT MODULE LIST

Support Module

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.9YM4VR2e6Y4MgmJ2]{Advanced Targeting Module}

While driving this personal vehicle, you gain a +2 bonus to your Accuracy Checks and to Magic Checks for offensive spells (@ICON[offensive]) you cast.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.76ieutWWlthLOXap]{Aerial Module} (counts as two enabled modules)

This personal vehicle can fly, and its distance becomes ×3.

While you are driving this personal vehicle, your melee attacks can target flying creatures, and none of the creatures inside the personal vehicle can be targeted by melee attacks unless the attacker is flying or is somehow able to reach flying targets.

These benefits do not apply while the personal vehicle is inactive or grounded, while you are in Crisis, or while you are covering another creature with the Guard action. Additionally, if a creature aboard this personal vehicle suffers air, bolt or ice damage during a conflict, the benefits of this module cease until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.nFC5y451Xd24hlM7]{Anti-Element Module}

Each time you enable this module on your personal vehicle, choose a damage type: air, bolt, earth, fire or ice. Creatures aboard this personal vehicle are treated as being Resistant to the chosen damage type until this module remains enabled.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.zhzy9ZWLUwZc0BKg]{Counterstrike Module}

After a creature aboard this personal vehicle is hit by a ranged attack, if you are driving this vehicle, you may spend 1 Inventory Point. If you do, the attacker suffers 10 physical damage (after their attack has been resolved). This amount increases by 5 damage if you are level 20 or higher, or by 10 damage if you are level 40 or higher.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.Hi6V9QoWjKofxZkQ]{Excavation Module}

This personal vehicle can burrow through the ground and is equipped with powerful lights.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.Fa1V1JIKwTD1uMqY]{Expanded Plating Module} (Mecha and Steed frames only)

While you are driving this personal vehicle, if it has an active Heavy, Runic, or Standard Plating module, all passengers aboard may treat their Defense and Magic Defense scores as being equal to those provided by the armor module in question (they may still use their normal scores if those would be better).

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.CVQO5xvCXzTCc7ca]{Magistatic Module}

After you pay the MP cost of an Arcanum, spell, or verse, if you are driving this personal vehicle and have an arcane weapon equipped, you recover 5 Mind Points, or 10 Mind Points if the cost was equal to or higher than 30 MP.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.qzvVPIVFgZ9jtOYT]{Power Module} (Exoskeleton and Mecha frames only)

While driving this personal vehicle, you gain a +2 bonus to all Opposed Checks that rely on brute force or physical resistance.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.hTpTh6WA2AGkRymI]{Rapid Interface Module}

When you enter this personal vehicle on your turn during a conflict, you may immediately perform an additional action.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.P1Vw28xK0NzPydqG]{Seafarer Module}

This personal vehicle can travel on water and underwater.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.vGz7COjgUSUh9vY3]{Seat Module} (Mecha and Steed frames only)

This personal vehicle can transport an additional human-sized passenger.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.7qyCrf1eK0X6bYTH]{Secondary Offensive Module} (Exoskeleton and Mecha frames only)

Each time you enable this module on your personal vehicle, choose one disabled weapon module. As long as the chosen module is disabled and this module is enabled, you may use an action to perform a free attack with that weapon module.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.F281qYUhqNxVoSk3]{Sensor Module}

While driving this personal vehicle, you gain a +2 bonus to Open Checks made to examine nearby creatures, items, and locations.

@UUID[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.OEgMfny6AwrXCkEg]{Turbo Module}

While driving this personal vehicle, you gain a +2 bonus to all Opposed Checks that rely on speed and rapid maneuvers.
